zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Lindsey於1261年出生在蘇格蘭艾斯爾可萊吉時，她的父親William de Lindsay - Lord of Lamberton11歲，母親Ada De Baliol15歲。她於1290年與Sir William Mure 3rd of Rowallan, Knight在英國蘇格蘭艾斯爾可萊吉結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1312年12月在蘇格蘭艾斯爾享年51歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭艾斯爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Lindsey于1261年出生在苏格兰艾斯爾可萊吉时，她的父亲William de Lindsay - Lord of Lamberton11岁，母亲Ada De Baliol15岁。她于1290年与Sir William Mure 3rd of Rowallan, Knight在英国苏格兰艾斯爾可萊吉结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1312年12月在苏格兰艾斯爾享年51岁，埋葬在苏格兰艾斯爾。

nameMeanings.name: Lindsey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish: shortened and Anglicized form of various Gaelic surnames, as for example Ó Loingsigh (see Lynch 1), Mac Giolla Fhionntóg (see McClintock ), and Ó Fhloinn (see Flynn and Lynn ).

variants.name: McClintock
meanings: Scottish and northern Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Gille Fhionndaig ‘son of the servant of (Saint) Fionntóg’, a personal name derived from a pet form of fionn ‘white’. Compare Lindsey .
History: A Scottish family of this name settled in Donegal in the late 16th century.

variants.name: Lindsay
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from Lindsey in Lincolnshire, England. This is first found in the form Lindissi, apparently a derivative of the British name of Lincoln . To this was later added the Old English element ēg ‘island’, since the place was virtually cut off by the surrounding fenland. The surname was taken to Scotland at an early date and is the name of an important and powerful Scottish family.
Irish: adopted as an equivalent ofvarious Gaelic names (see   Lindsey  ).

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Lindsey was born in 1261, in Craigie, Ayrshire, Scotland, her father, William de Lindsay - Lord of Lamberton, was 11 and her mother, Ada De Baliol, was 15. She married Sir William Mure 3rd of Rowallan, Knight in 1290, in Craigie, Ayrshire, Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died in December 1312, in Ayrshire, Scotland, at the age of 51, and was buried in Ayrshire, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Lindsey est née en 1261, à Craigie, Ayrshire, Écosse, son père, William de Lindsay - Lord of Lamberton, avait 11 ans et sa mère, Ada De Baliol, avait 15 ans. Elle a épousé Sir William Mure 3rd of Rowallan, Knight en 1290, à Craigie, Ayrshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en décembre 1312, à Ayrshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 51 ans, et a été enterrée à Ayrshire, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret Lindsey 1261 in Craigie, Ayrshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William de Lindsay - Lord of Lamberton 11 und ihre Mutter Ada De Baliol 15. Sie hat 1290 in Craigie, Ayrshire, Schottland, United Kingdom Sir William Mure 3rd of Rowallan, Knight geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb im Dezember 1312 im Alter von 51 Jahren in Ayrshire, Scotland und wurde in Ayrshire, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Lindsey è nata il nel 1261 nel Craigie, Ayrshire, Scotland, sua padre, William de Lindsay - Lord of Lamberton, aveva 11 anni e sua madre, Ada De Baliol, aveva 15 anni. Lei sposato Sir William Mure 3rd of Rowallan, Knight nel 1290, nel Craigie, Ayrshire, Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel dicembre 1312, nel Ayrshire, Scotland, all'età di 51 anni, e fu sepolta a Ayrshire, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Lindseyが1261年にスコットランドエイルシュアイアクレイジで生まれた時，父William de Lindsay - Lord of Lambertonは11歳，母Ada De Baliolは15歳であった。1290年にイギリススコットランドエイルシュアイアクレイジでSir William Mure 3rd of Rowallan, Knightと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1312年12月にスコットランドエイルシュアイアで51歳で死去し，スコットランドエイルシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Lindsey(이)가 1261년 스컷랜드 에이르실르 크레이기에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William de Lindsay - Lord of Lamberton(은)는 11세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Ada De Baliol(은)는 15세였다. 그녀는 1290년 영국 스코틀랜드 에이르실르 크레이기에서 Sir William Mure 3rd of Rowallan, Knight(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1312년 12월 스컷랜드 에이르실르에서 51세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 에이르실르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Lindsey nasceu em 1261, em Craigie, Ayrshire, Scotland, seu pai, William de Lindsay - Lord of Lamberton, tinha 11 anos e sua mãe, Ada De Baliol, tinha 15 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir William Mure 3rd of Rowallan, Knight em 1290, em Craigie, Ayrshire, Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em dezembro de 1312, em Ayrshire, Scotland, com 51 anos, e foi sepultada em Ayrshire, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Lindsey родилась в 1261 г. в местности креиги, аиршир, Шотландия, её отцу по имени William de Lindsay - Lord of Lamberton было 11 лет, а матери, которую звали Ada De Baliol, 15. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir William Mure 3rd of Rowallan, Knight в 1290 г. в местности креиги, аиршир, Шотландия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла декабрь 1312 г. в местности аиршир, Шотландия в возрасте 51 год и была похоронена в местности аиршир, Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margaret Lindsey nació en 1261, en Craigie, Ayrshire, Scotland, su papá, William de Lindsay - Lord of Lamberton, tenía 11 años y su mamá, Ada De Baliol, tenía 15 años. Se casó con Sir William Mure 3rd of Rowallan, Knight en 1290, en Craigie, Ayrshire, Escocia, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en diciembre de 1312, en Ayrshire, Scotland, a la edad de 51 años, y fue sepultada en Ayrshire, Scotland.
